# Description

# [PKT-LFC-006](task-0040): Uninstall Current AUDiaGentic

## Purpose

Uninstall current AUDiaGentic installation.

## Scope

- Detect installation
- Remove files
- Clean state

## Implementation

1. Detect installation
2. Remove files
3. Clean state

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Installation detected
2. Files removed
3. State cleaned
